name: yarradev
description: yarradev board orchestrator: a reconciliation-loop skill that drives a yarradev HTTP board (Cloudflare Durable Object) and dispatches role subagents (designer/developer/tester/security-advisor/code-reviewer/devops/releaser) through a gated lifecycle (spec→dev→test→done→staging→prod) via the Agent tool — running on your own Claude subscription.
